title: Diamonds Mod by Unsaid
description: Mod that adds another type of material and something more
body:
Adds Another Material called Diamonds, but it is not same as the minecraft diamond...
It is crafted with Diamond Crystals.

We have Diamonds Sword, Diamonds Axe, Diamonds Pickaxe, Diamonds Aromor set, new dimension called Diamonds Land and for the last there are 2 new music discs (crafting recipe is for both but not showed in gallery)

New things in version 1.2.0 are: 
- Villager Profesion - Diamonds Villager
- Lava Gem - Now has only use for trading with Diamonds Villager
- Amethyst Gem - Now has no use, later will have

More coming soon...

Patreon- There is a link for donations
